findings.title: Editor accepts unknown placeholders → stray {token} 500s send path (OTP reset bricked); needs allowed-catalogue (patch drafted+reverted)
Only 7 of 21 template keys editable; rest keep hardcoded copy
No SMS segment / GSM-7 vs UCS-2 validation — silent multi-segment cost fan-out
No URL allowlist for literal URLs in template bodies (phishing) — admin-gated
Orphan seeded key topup.success editable but never sent
